property.name: tez.am.resource.memory.mb
property.description: Memory allocated for the Tez Application Master (AM)

property.name: tez.am.java.opts
property.description: JVM parameters for the Tez Application Master

property.name: tez.task.resource.memory.mb
property.description: Memory size for Tez task containers

property.name: tez.task.launch.cmd-opts
property.description: Java command line options for Tez task launch

property.name: tez.container.reuse.enabled
property.description: Re-uses containers in Tez to minimize YARN task-startup overhead

property.name: tez.container.reuse.max-holding-time-ms
property.description: Maximum time (in ms) an idle container is held waiting for new tasks

property.name: tez.container.reuse.locational-delay-allocation-ms
property.description: Time to wait for matching node/rack locality before giving container to any task

property.name: tez.runtime.io.sort.mb
property.description: Size of the sort buffer when writing/sorting intermediate data

property.name: tez.runtime.unordered.output.buffer.size-mb
property.description: Size of the buffer for unordered outputs (e.g. MapJoins)

property.name: tez.runtime.pipelined.shuffle.enabled
property.description: Enables pipelined shuffle, allowing downstream tasks to fetch map output partitions while they are being written

property.name: tez.grouping.min-size
property.description: Minimum size of grouping input splits

property.name: tez.grouping.max-size
property.description: Maximum size of grouping input splits

property.name: tez.history.logging.class
property.description: Logging class to write history data
